rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §12.131 governs charter school student discipline and expulsion. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: The governing body of an open-enrollment charter school shall adopt a code of conduct for its district or for each campus.
_note: No relationship between the proposed property-tax exemption change and this charter-school discipline statute.
